test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

blockingIssues.description: Auto-commit verification did not run through Dolt SQL server conditions. Evidence used manual dolt commit fallback, which does not prove required auto-commit behavior.
Dispatch verification captured bead state as hooked via --hook-raw-bead, but feature requires transition to in_progress.
Required verification for `gt mayor attach scbench` was not completed.
Preflight script invokes two_agent_runner with system python3 (3.10), which fails before canary logic due to datetime.UTC import mismatch.

appliedUpdates.description: Aligned lint command with mission validator scope by adding tests/analysis/ path.
Added runtime knowledge for uv-managed Python requirement, Gas Town smtp_port string quirk, and Dolt SQL-server auto-commit validation mode.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require `services.yaml` start + healthcheck before validating server-dependent Dolt assertions, and require auto-commit checks through the SQL server path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dolt-tables review failed because port 3307 was down and verification proceeded via local/manual commit path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit non-interactive fallback guidance for interactive commands like `gt mayor attach`, including acceptable evidence for equivalent verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: gastown-dispatch-comms review failed because required attach verification could not be completed in non-interactive mode.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require a real runtime smoke test for new shell entrypoints that invoke Python scripts, not only mocked/unit tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: canary-preflight-gate passed tests but failed in environment due to python3 interpreter mismatch in production script.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify commit/push expectations for features that only mutate external workspace state and produce no repository file changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: gastown-dispatch-comms reused a prior commit ID while mission guidance mandates commit/push after every feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document Dolt 1.84.1 INSERT IGNORE duplicate-PK panic directly in infra-worker skill.
rejectedObservations.reason: version-specific behavior may not generalize across Dolt versions; better tracked as local issue evidence rather than durable procedural rule

rejectedObservations.observation: Add separate guidance that formula commands must run from Gas Town workspace context.
rejectedObservations.reason: covered by broader recommendation to strengthen infra-worker setup/preflight guidance for tool context and prerequisites
